arts.ttl: Burnley Football Club manager Scott Parker issues injury update and team news ahead of Bristol City clash
arts.sum: Burnley manager Scott Parker has given an update on the fitness of his squad ahead of the Clarets return to action following the international break.

arts.ttl: Fally Mayulu and Sinclair Armstrong set Bristol City challenge ahead of 'heavy' festive schedule
arts.sum: Although the expectation is that Nahki Wells will retain his place in the starting line-up, Manning insists that both Mayulu and Armstrong are continuously improving behind the scenes and believes both forwards will have a role to play over the coming weeks and months at Ashton Gate. Liam Manning has challenged Fally Mayulu and Sinclair Armstrong to grab their opportunity as Bristol City enter a “heavy game period” in the run-up to the festive schedule.

arts.ttl: Christian Eriksen lands Celtic pitch as Man Utd exit nears with Josh Brownhill signalling transfer model 'tweak'
arts.sum: The Danish midfielder is facing a big call on his future with Brendan Rodgers among his long-term admirers

arts.ttl: Anis Mehmeti on international intentions, Burnley clash and his Bristol City 'responsibility'
arts.sum: Although Mehmeti believes he’s currently playing his best football in a Bristol City shirt, the winger is striving to add that consistency to his game to take his career to the next level at Ashton Gate. Anis Mehmeti has certainly had a mixed start to his Bristol City career so far, having made the switch to Ashton Gate almost two years ago in January 2023.

arts.ttl: Lazio and two other Serie A clubs interested in Burnley midfielder Brownhill
arts.sum: Lazio are one of three Serie A clubs reportedly interested in picking up a deal...

arts.ttl: Burnley Football Club press conference: manager Scott Parker looks ahead to Bristol City clash
arts.sum: Burnley manager Scott Parker championed the virtues of “stability” in his first press conference back since the international break.

arts.ttl: Bristol City team news ahead of Burnley as Liam Manning sheds light on Joe Williams injury
arts.sum: Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community. Bristol City will be without Joe Williams for their clash with Burnley with the midfielder set to be ruled out for months with a partial Achilles tendon tear.
